title: Cobbled Variants
description: A cobblemon Addon that adds various variants to existing cobblemons
body:
# **Cobbled Variants** is a datapack that aims to add various little variants for many mons. For now most of them are decorative only tho maybe it could change
## Current mon list:
- **Voltorb** line with different pokeballs
- **H. Voltorb** line with different ancient pokeballs
- **Roggenrola** line with different ores
- **Wooper** line with different axolotl colors
- **Carbink and Diancie** With different Type Gem colors
- **Phantump** Line with different tree types
- **Beldum** Line with different Ores 
- **Honedge** Line with different sword materials
### and More to come!

## How to obtain them
- **Voltorb** line uses cosmetic slot with different pokeballs (Also has a **Gmax Form** that you can obtain by Gmaxing it)
- **Roggenrola** line uses cosmetic slot with different ore items (**Mega showdown** variants compatible)
- **Wooper** Line can be caught by fishing in a lush cave
- **Carbin and Diancie** use cosmetic slot with different Type gems
- **Phantump** line uses cosmetic slot with different log
- **Beldum** line uses cosmetic slot with different ingots (**Oritech** variants compatible)
- **Honedge** line uses cosmetic slot with different swords (**Mega Showdown** Variant for Rusted Sword, **Exceptions**: Copper needs copper ingot and rusted variant can use both the sword and shield)

To suggest stuff, report bugs and much more join Cobblemon's Discord and write em in "Cobbled Variants Support forum" in the forum channels named "content-zone-help"
(Carbink and Diancie model, Anims, Poser and base texture credits: netimmerse on discord)
